## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] Backend / FastAPI
- [ ] Frontend / React
- [ ] Retrieval, embeddings, or FAISS index
- [ ] DBpedia / SPARQL integration
- [ ] Docker or CI
- [ ] Documentation only

## Verification

- [ ] `CI=true PYTHONPATH=. pytest tests/`
- [ ] `cd frontend/rag-app && npm test`
- [ ] `cd frontend/rag-app && npm run build`
- [ ] Docker smoke test, if runtime behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit API keys, embedding artifacts, generated build output, or local environment files.
- [ ] I updated documentation for setup, runtime, or behavior changes.
- [ ] I preserved attribution to the WSU capstone team and HackerEarth project context.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
